name: Acalabrutinib
instructions: If patient not otherwise instructed: Hold 7 days unless patient instructed otherwise (3 days would be common alternative)

name: Butalbital/acetaminophen/caffeine (Fioricet)
instructions: Do not take on day of surgery; if has aspirin component, stop 7 days prior to surgery--> if taking on a daily basis, recommend consulting prescriber for 2 week taper to prevent withdrawal

name: butalbital/aspirin/caffeine/codeine
instructions: Do not take on day of surgery; if has aspirin component, stop 7 days prior to surgery--> if taking on a daily basis, recommend consulting prescriber for 2 week taper to prevent withdrawal

name: Voclosporin (systemic)
instructions: Discuss with surgeon. Surgery should be scheduled at end of cycle

name: Cyclosporine
instructions: If organ transplant recipient, continue; Otherwise hold for 7 days if patient not otherwise instructed

name: tacrolimus (systemic)
instructions: If organ transplant recipient, continue; Otherwise hold for 7 days if patient not otherwise instructed

name: Cannabidiol preparations (dronabinol)

name: THC
instructions: Hold 3 days for recreational use; continue if using for medical reason (e.g. epilepsy, nausea)--> do not smoke the day of surgery

name: Marijuana
instructions: Hold 3 days for recreational use; continue if using for medical reason (e.g. epilepsy, nausea)--> do not smoke the day of surgery

name: Capsaicin topical
instructions: May continue if not applied to surgical area.

name: Levocarnitine
instructions: Hold on day of surgery while NPO (taken with food)

instructions: If patient not otherwise instructed: hold 1 week

instructions: If patient not otherwise instructed: hold 1 week

name: Palbociclib
instructions: If patient not otherwise instructed: hold 1 week

Semaglutide (injectable)

name: Dihydroergotamine

name: Ergotamine/caffeine

instructions: Continue unless otherwise instructed by surgeon.

instructions: Continue unless otherwise instructed by surgeon.

name: Sonidegib

name: Premarin

name: Prasterone (DHEA)

name: Estradiol

name: Rilonacept (Arcalyst)
instructions: If patient not otherwise instructed: hold 1 week

name: Canakinumab

name: Mycophenolate

name: ruxolitinib
instructions: Continue because it can cause withdrawal.

name: Urea Cream

name: Sirolimus

name: Everolimus
instructions: If organ transplant recipient, continue; Otherwise hold for 7 days if patient not otherwise instructed.

name: Colestipol
instructions: Hold for 2 days prior to surgery

name: Colesevelam
instructions: Hold for 2 days prior to surgery

name: Celecoxib

category: Norepineprhine and Dopamine Reuptake Inhibitor/Opiate Antagonist
name: Bupropion/naltrexone
instructions: Hold for 72 hours, consult PAC provider; contact prescriber to provide bupropion

name: omega-3-acid ethyl esters (Lovaza)
instructions: Hold 7 days unless approved by surgeon.

name: Fish oil
instructions: Hold 7 days unless approved by surgeon.

name: naloxone (oral)
instructions: Hold day of surgery (if naloxone in combination with buprenorphine, follow buprenorphine/naloxone instructions)

name: Naltrexone
instructions: Oral naltrexone: stop 3 days prior to procedure; SQ/IM naltrexone: stop 28 days prior to procedure; if combo with topiramate, patient MUST call prescriber to prescribe topiramate separately to prevent topiramate withdrawal seizure; if combo with bupropion; contact prescriber to provide bupropion separately

name: Abaloparatide
instructions: Continue; unless otherwise instructed by surgery clinic

name: cinacalcet
instructions: Continue; unless otherwise instructed by surgery clinic

name: teriparatide
instructions: Continue; unless otherwise instructed by surgery clinic

name: Olaparib
instructions: Hold 3 days unless otherwise instructed by surgery clinic

category: Partial Nicotinic Receptor Agonist, Smoking Cessation
name: Varenicline
Cilostazol
instructions: Antiplatelet action. Defer to surgeon, otherwise hold 5 days.

name: Sildenafil
instructions: Continue if taking for pulmonary hypertension or BPH; Hold for 24hrs if taking for erectile dysfunction

name: Vardenafil
instructions: Continue if taking for pulmonary hypertension or BPH; Hold for 24hrs if taking for erectile dysfunction

name: Avanafil
instructions: Hold for 24h if taking for erectile dysfunction

name: Tadalafil
instructions: Continue if taking for pulmonary hypertension or BPH; Hold for 24hrs if taking for erectile dysfunction

name: Lactobacillus
instructions: Continue; unless otherwise instructed by surgery clinic

name: Acitretin
instructions: Continue unless otherwise instructed by surgeon.

name: Isotretinoin
instructions: Continue unless otherwise instructed by surgeon.

name: Phentermine
instructions: Hold for 4 days prior to procedure. Discuss with PAC provider if taking combination with topiramate to ensure topiramate gets continued

name: Phentermine/Topiramate
instructions: Hold for 4 days prior to procedure. Discuss with PAC provider if taking combination with topiramate to ensure topiramate gets continued

name: Docetaxel
instructions: Hold 4 weeks unless instructed differently by oncology or surgeon

name: Trimix (alprostadil/papaverine/phentolamine)
instructions: Hold for 24h if used for erectile dysfunction

name: Bi-Mix (Papaverine/phentolamine)
instructions: Hold for 24h if used for erectile dysfunction

name: All vitamins and supplements EXCEPT electrolytes, calcitriol/Vitamin D
instructions: Hold 7 days unless required for specific metabolic syndrome. If prescribed by a medical professional, patient should ask them.
